personalInfo.name: Mohamed Rizk Shalaby
personalInfo.tagline: I build production-grade mobile apps that ship.
personalInfo.objective: Flutter Developer with around 3 years of experience building cross-platform mobile applications for e-commerce and delivery domains. I've shipped multiple production apps to Google Play and the App Store, including multi-role systems (Customer, Driver, Vendor, Admin). Comfortable with GetX, Bloc, Cubit, RESTful APIs, and Clean Architecture — focused on writing maintainable code and delivering polished UI/UX.

achievements: Delivering production-level mobile applications for clients across e-commerce and delivery domains.
Developed SeeSooq, a full-featured e-commerce platform for buying and selling products.
Built the Jaeek delivery system (Customer & Driver apps) with multiple branded white-label versions including Itsbase.
Created a Pets Store app with a smooth, scalable shopping experience.
Developed a Fashion e-commerce app supporting multi-role functionality (Customer & Store/Vendor).
Designed and implemented multi-role architectures (Admin, Vendor, Customer, Driver) ensuring scalability and maintainability.
Integrated real-time features, payment gateways, and RESTful APIs across all apps.
Focused on performance optimization, clean architecture, and high-quality UI/UX.
Developed and maintained multiple mobile apps using Flutter — Bank App, Monazamah, and Acwad HR.
Built a secure banking application with authentication, transactions, and account management features.
Developed an organization app to manage users and workflows efficiently.
Integrated RESTful APIs and handled data management with clean architecture.
Applied GetX / Bloc state management to keep code scalable and maintainable.
Designed responsive and user-friendly UI/UX with high performance across devices.

education.detail: Hands-on Flutter & Dart training with focus on clean code, API integration, state management, and responsive UI/UX.

projects.name: SeeSooq
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform for buying and selling products. Implemented product listings, categories, cart, and order management with optimized performance and responsiveness across devices.

projects.name: Jaeek
projects.description: A scalable delivery platform with separate Customer and Driver (Captain) applications, plus multiple white-label branded versions including Itsbase. Real-time order tracking, notifications, and full order lifecycle management.

projects.name: Peets
projects.description: An e-commerce application for selling pet products and accessories. Built around clean architecture with a high-performance UI/UX, full product catalog, cart, checkout, and order management.

projects.name: Fashion App
projects.description: A fashion e-commerce app supporting multi-role functionality — Customer and Store/Vendor — built with scalability and maintainability in mind from day one.

projects.name: Bank App
projects.description: A secure banking application built with Flutter & GetX. Authentication, transactions, account management, QR-based payments, and Firebase-powered notifications for transaction updates.

projects.name: Monazamah
projects.description: An organization-management app for handling tasks, users, and workflows efficiently. APIs sync data while Firebase pushes real-time updates and reminders. NFC support powers fast read/write task workflows.

projects.name: Acwad HR
projects.description: An HR system integrating REST APIs and Firebase for data handling and authentication. Shipped a native macOS variant with enhanced UI and animations. Features employee management, attendance tracking, and real-time updates.
